problem id: 25705f72
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) XOR SHL(4)

examples:
  01010100 -> 01101010
  10111001 -> 01001100
  11010100 -> 00101010
  11011001 -> 01111100
  11000100 -> 00100010
  00010000 -> 00001000
  11011111 -> 00011111
  10011011 -> 01111101

query: 11000001
predicted answer: 11110000
